prestazioni: F140 B/C 6.0L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Replace the OEM IHI twin-scroll exhaust manifolds with custom 1.75" primary tube equal-length headers by Capristo, paired with a full titanium 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust system featuring quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips and a secondary bypass valve for on-demand backpressure reduction, increasing output to ~780 HP at 8,200 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline via Motec M190 ECU recalibration and custom camshaft profiles by Jenvey Dynamics (292° intake / 288° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift).

Forced induction conversion: Install a bespoke twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (84mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with custom billet aluminum compressor inlets, TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates, and a PWR 1,500 HP bar-and-plate intercooler with 4.5" core thickness, achieving 1,050 HP on 93 octane with 22 psi boost, supported by a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup and a custom dry-sump oil system by Peterson Fluid Systems (8-stage pump, 12-quart reservoir).

Drivetrain reinforcement: Replace the OEM F1-derived 6-speed automated manual with a Ricardo-developed 7-speed dual-clutch transaxle (strengthened internals, carbon-fiber clutch plates, and a Quaife ATB differential), paired with a custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio and a GKN VL3 driveshaft with CV joints rated for 1,200 Nm torque. Suspension upgraded to Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing control arms by SuperPro, and a custom front sway bar (24mm hollow, adjustable drop links) for reduced understeer.
estetica: Carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Torado, featuring extended front fenders (30mm per side), rear quarter panels (50mm per side), and a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin Gurney flaps, all constructed from pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber with a 2x2 twill weave finish. Front splitter replaced with a 3D-printed titanium unit by Varis, adjustable for 150 lbs of downforce at 180 mph.

Custom active aero package by 991 Racing, including a hydraulically actuated rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span) with a 30° attack angle and a front hood vent system (carbon-fiber NACA ducts) to evacuate 30% more airflow from the radiator. Side skirts replaced with aluminum honeycomb-core units by APR Performance, reducing lift by 22% while improving brake cooling via integrated ducting.

Interior overhaul: Replace OEM carbon-fiber seats with Sparco Pro 2000 FIA-approved racing buckets (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point harness slots), paired with a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (chromoly 4130, TIG-welded, with integrated fire suppression system by Life Racing). Steering wheel swapped for a MOMO Mod.70 carbon-fiber unit with integrated Motec C127 dash display, and the center console modified to house a bespoke paddle-shift system by Heidts with sequential gear indicators.
